core_mechanism: revealed-preference rationalizability test: checking whether a finite set of observed choices can be generated by maximizing a single latent objective function subject to a fixed set of consistency axioms, and quantifying how far the data deviate from that optimizing structure
brief_reason: The abstract frames the method as a revealed-preference test of the full axiom set underpinning (expected) utility theory, measuring how consistent observed individual choices are with maximization of a latent utility.
